name: AMD

It also has two dated catalysts ahead: Advancing AI 2026 on July 23 and fiscal Q2 2026 results on Aug. 4. name: Bitcoin
rationale: BTC is the cleanest live long in the watchlist: mom_1m is +0.62% with the lowest daily volatility among the positive-momentum crypto names, while Reuters-linked coverage says U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs turned back to inflows after the softer June jobs data cooled near-term Fed-hike fears and helped risk assets.
